summary: Verified Vercel deploy hardening: (a) full backend regression 16/16 pytest suite passes against public preview URL with DB configured, (b) code inspection confirms server.py is tolerant to missing MONGO_URL (module imports without KeyError; require_db() gates auth endpoints; get_current_user_optional/get_quota_status/_refund_quota/check_and_consume_quota all short-circuit safely when db is None), (c) frontend home page renders correctly with NO third-party scripts eager-loaded (index.html contains only meta + <div id='root'> + noscript), (d) full UI signup + mock payment flow works and Razorpay checkout.js is NOT injected in mock mode.

verified_regression.GET /api/health: returns {status:'ok', db_configured:true} (via code inspection + working /api/ proves same import path)
verified_regression.pytest suite: 16/16 pass in ~10s (auth register/login/logout/me, terabox validation, quota consumption/refund/429, subscription mock/config/create-order/verify-blocked, google session 401, webhook sig, favorites/history/continue-watching CRUD)

verified_code_safety.server.py line 35-47: mongo_url = os.environ.get('MONGO_URL', ''); client=None, db=None if not mongo_url — no KeyError at import
verified_code_safety.server.py line 50-56: require_db() raises 503 with clean detail when db is None
verified_code_safety.server.py line 155-157: get_current_user_optional returns None when db is None
verified_code_safety.server.py line 239-240: get_quota_status returns default free quota when db is None
verified_code_safety.server.py line 201-202: check_and_consume_quota fails-open with default free quota when db is None
verified_code_safety.server.py line 577-578: _refund_quota is a no-op when db is None
verified_code_safety.server.py line 908-912: startup event returns early with warning log when db is None

verified_frontend_safety.public/index.html: Only contains meta tags + <noscript> + <div id='root'>. No PostHog/emergent-main.js/Razorpay checkout script. Confirmed at runtime: page.scripts contains only bundle.js + cloudflareinsights beacon.
verified_frontend_safety.src/App.js: Wraps app in ErrorBoundary correctly (import + <ErrorBoundary> around <AuthProvider>)
verified_frontend_safety.components/ErrorBoundary.jsx: componentDidCatch + getDerivedStateFromError implemented; reset UI has data-testid='error-reset-btn'
verified_frontend_safety.components/PaymentModal.jsx: handleLive() lazy-injects <script id='razorpay-checkout-js' src='https://checkout.razorpay.com/v1/checkout.js'> only when live-mode payment initiated. Verified at runtime in mock mode: document.getElementById('razorpay-checkout-js') === null after PaymentModal opens.
verified_frontend_safety.console_errors_on_home: Only 3 x '401' entries from /api/auth/me pre-login probe (expected). No 't.map is not a function' or other JS runtime errors.

verified_e2e_ui_flow.step2_click_upgrade_header: auth-modal opens; testids present: auth-modal, auth-tab-signup, auth-tab-login, google-signin-btn, auth-name-input, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit-btn
verified_e2e_ui_flow.step3_signup_fresh_email: Toast 'Account created!' shown; payment-modal opens with mock-notice visible; razorpay-checkout-js NOT in DOM (correct for mock)
verified_e2e_ui_flow.step4_click_pay_mock: Toast 'Welcome to LinkPlay Pro!'; pro-badge appears in header; mock-notice gone; payment-modal closed; pro-card shows 'You are already Pro'

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: All db-touching code paths now guarded — the import is fully tolerant to missing MONGO_URL and Vercel cold-start will no longer FUNCTION_INVOCATION_FAILED at module load.
index.html is now minimal (only meta + root div). Third-party scripts removed. This resolves the 't.map' crash from emergent-main.js/PostHog/Razorpay pre-loading on non-Emergent domains.
PaymentModal.jsx lazy-loads Razorpay only on live-mode click — clean, mode-aware.
ErrorBoundary is correctly placed at the outermost level in App.js (outside AuthProvider), so even a crash in AuthProvider is caught.

Minor: /api/subscribe/verify, /api/webhook/razorpay, /api/preferences etc. don't explicitly call require_db(). They will 500 on Vercel if MONGO_URL is unset, but only after 401 from get_current_user (which is safe), so effectively they degrade to 401 — acceptable for a misconfigured deployment. Could add require_db() for cleaner 503s if desired.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (full signup + mock upgrade flow verified end-to-end)

test_credentials: Fresh timestamped emails (fresh_<ts>@example.com) via test-run generation. Password: password123.
seed_data_creation: None persisted beyond fresh_<ts>@example.com registrations from pytest (isolated per-test) and one from Playwright UI flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vercel-safety iteration complete. Preview at https://terabox-stream-2.preview.emergentagent.com is healthy. Full backend regression + full frontend upgrade UX confirmed. User's Vercel domain will still 500 until they set MONGO_URL/JWT_SECRET/etc. in Vercel env — that's a config task on their side, not a code fix. Canonical backend regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_linkplay_backend.py.
